item.title: How to Become a Google Ads Specialist?
item.author: Author
item.description: What is a Google Ads Specialist? A Google Ads Specialist, often referred to as a PPC (Pay-Per-Click) specialist, plays a pivotal role in the world of digital marketing. This expert is responsible for planning, creating, optimizing, and managing Google Ads campaigns for businesses and organizations. Their primary goal is to maximize the return on investment (ROI) by ensuring that ads are seen by the right audience at the right time.

item.title: How to Create a Google Ads Campaign
item.author: Author
item.description: For many Google Ads’s beginners, it will be confusing to create a new Google Ads campaign when they hope to start their digital marketing strategy. Here I would like to offer the most detailed step by step guide to create your own first campaign. Before follow the steps bellow, please make sure that you have already own a valid Google Ads account. If you do not have such qualified account, please refer to the official guide and create one.
